SOURCE: 10694288.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (10694288.pdf)
SUMMARY: 13 years of Human Resources experience and 27 years of administrative experience working in various settings. Professional, detail-oriented, excellent time-management skills, team player, open and honest communicator, effective at maintaining confidentiality and multi-tasker.
SKILLS: Benefits, Consultation, Content, Counseling, Editor, HRIS, HR, Insurance, Microsoft applications, Navigator, Newsletter, Page, Assist patients, Payroll, Payroll processing, Personnel Management, Phone system, Policies, Reporting, Research, Website

SOURCE: 10694288.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Benefits/Leave Coordinator
COMPANY: Company Name City , State
DATES: December 2016 - Current
DESCRIPTION: ['Provide consultation and assistance for all employee benefits.', 'Assist with retirement counseling, generate calculations, and trainings.', 'Promote and coordinate the Highlander Wellness Watch program.', 'Advise on leave policies and procedures.', 'Develop and present leave trainings.', 'Content editor for HR newsletter and website committee.', 'Analyze and reconcile leave discrepancies.', 'Process Workers Compensation claims, short term disability claims, and FMLA requests.', 'Coordinate return to work for employees.', 'Maintain OSHA logs and reports.', 'Process leave corrections and share requests with payroll.', 'Calculate leave payouts for separating employees.', 'Ensure compliance with FLSA regulations in Banner (HRIS).', 'Perform leave audits.', 'Support online leave reporting system.', 'Assist with other HR duties as needed.']

SOURCE: 10694288.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Leave Coordinator

DESCRIPTION: ['Advise on leave policies and procedures.', 'Develop and present leave trainings.', 'Analyze and reconcile leave discrepancies.', 'Process Workers Compensation claims, short term disability claims, and FMLA requests.', 'Coordinate return to work for employees.', 'Maintain OSHA logs and reports.', 'Process leave corrections and share requests with payroll.', 'Calculate leave payouts for separating employees.', 'Ensure compliance with FLSA regulations in Banner (HRIS).', 'Assist with CommonHealth wellness program.', 'Perform leave audits.', 'Support online leave reporting system.', 'Assist with other HR duties as needed.']

SOURCE: 10694288.pdf
JOB TITLE: Personnel Transaction Specialist/Human Resource Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name City , State
DATES: June 2004 - November 2008
DESCRIPTION: ['Process new hires, transfers, and promotions into Banner and PMIS systems.', 'Perform payroll audits.', 'Process short term disability claims and FMLA requests.', 'Coordinate with payroll.', 'Handle other duties as needed.']

SOURCE: 10694288.pdf
JOB TITLE: Communications Operator
COMPANY: Company Name City , State
DATES: August 2002 - June 2004
DESCRIPTION: ['Refer patients to appropriate areas.', 'Assist with patient questions and concerns via phone or walk-ins.', 'Answer incoming calls on a seven-line system.', 'Page doctors in a timely manner.', 'Update call schedules.', 'File and overhead codes.']
